Dear Eoin,

Thank you for bringing your billing concern to our attention. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

To ensure that your claims are paid directly into your bank account, please update your bank details in your Member Area. Here's how you can do it:

1. Log in to your Member Area.
2. Under the section ‘My Claims’, select ‘Claims bank details’.
3. Update your account name and IBAN.

Should you require any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our team.

Best regards,
Your
